headline: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy as AI Powers Steady Semiconductor Sales
summary: AI-fueled chip demand lifts NVDA, ADI, TXN and NXPI as global semiconductor sales surge in Q1 2026.

raw.headline: 4 Solid Stocks to Buy as AI Powers Steady Semiconductor Sales
raw.summary: AI-fueled chip demand lifts NVDA, ADI, TXN and NXPI as global semiconductor sales surge in Q1 2026.

headline: Peace Hopes, Chip Fireworks, and a Disney Encore
summary: A ceasefire that isn't done yet, a chipmaker that reset the bar for the entire sector, and a Disney that reminded everyone it knows how to grow. Wednesday on Wall Street had no shortage of catalysts and for once, they all pointed in the same direction.

raw.headline: Peace Hopes, Chip Fireworks, and a Disney Encore
